THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'SORIO, JANET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1509 SHRADER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,000.00 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,900.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. BACK RENT, ATTNYS FEES & COSTS WAIVED IF DEFT. VACATES BY SAID DATE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFT'S ANSWER FILED ON OR ABOUT MARCH 31, 1997, SHALL STAND AS THE ANSWER TO THE SUPPLENTAL COMPLAINT.
